entries.role: BS in Computer Science and Engineering (GPA: 4.3)
bullets: *Relevant Coursework:* Data Structures & Algorithms, Software Construction, Web Design
*Activities:* MIT Undergraduate Research Opportunities Program, Walker Memorial Basement Radio 88.1FM, MIT Live
Own end-to-end frontend of the product, prototyping features and delivering polished, production-ready interfaces
Built and maintain the full marketing site and interactive product demos used in investor and customer-facing presentations
Defined visual identity and design system including logo; responsible for all brand, motion, and interaction decisions
Created advanced Excel macros to automate reports, minimizing errors in high-stakes administrative workflows
Served as squad leader in a top-ranked infantry platoon (1st of 48) in CQB room-clearing competition
Developed a server-side rendered digital exhibition platform with Next.js, improving accessibility and SEO
Collaborated with MIT History faculty to launch a digital archive of activist murals, increased visibility to 1,000+ users
Architected repo partitions (web / worker / db) and built full Next.js storefront with voice-first mic launcher (Web Speech API) and customer complaint inbox in a 2-hour build sprint

Designed plan-approve-execute UX for an autonomous freight-exception agent on Cloudflare Workers (Subconscious reasoning, Baseten vision/ASR); live SSE trace surfaces draft carrier, customer, and AR messages

Owned full Next.js 16 frontend for an ACL-injury triage app: coach dashboard with three-sport rosters of 60+ athletes, body-silhouette injury visualization, structured check-in flow, and role-based login routing
Integrated FastAPI backend running MediaPipe pose extraction and RAG-grounded rehab retrieval to turn short video + text intake into severity and urgency bands

Built a civic social platform for sharing community service and relaying inspiration into chains of civic action, with a map of local events, one-tap sign-ups, and a trending feed ranked by 24-hour inspiration count
Full-stack: React 19 frontend (Bun, GSAP, Leaflet) deployed on Vercel; Flask backend on Railway backed by Firestore and Cloud Storage
Built a Chrome extension personalizing Amazon search rankings in real time using AI-inferred behavioral profiles
Engineered full-stack: TypeScript Lambda on AWS API Gateway, DynamoDB profile persistence, DOM reranking with AI-generated explanation badges
Developed a tokenized property deed system and live marketplace prototype, leading a team of 5+ to explore trust, ownership, and verification in digital marketplaces
Built frontend with real-time transaction UI; presented to panel of judges at MIT Bitcoin Expo

sections.title: Skills
list: Languages & Frameworks: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Next.js, React, FastAPI, Flask
Cloud, Edge & Infra: AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB), Cloudflare Workers, GCP (Firestore, Cloud Storage), Vercel, Railway
AI/ML & Tooling: LLM agents & MCP servers, RAG-grounded retrieval, MediaPipe pose estimation

sections.title: Honors & Awards
list: Educational Broadcasting System (EBS) Janghak Quiz Competition Winner (2023)
